title: Briny Velvety Mediterranean Cheese Bake
description: A comforting, Whole30-friendly mediterranean dish featuring cream cheese, mirepoix-base, and a crunchy breadcrumb topping.

ingredients.name: almond meal
ingredients.notes: toasted in a 350° oven for 5 minutes

instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the garlic, shallot, and onion in olive oil over medium heat until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the lemon juice and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the liquid is almost completely reduced.
Stir in the parsley, feta, and capers, and cook until the feta is slightly melted and the mixture is heated through.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, eggs, salt, and black pepper, and mix until smooth.
Add the toasted almond meal and mix until well combined.
Add the cooked mirepoix mixture and mix until just combined.
Spoon the mixture into 4 (6 oz) ramekins or small baking dishes.
Top each ramekin with chopped olives and a sprinkle of almond meal.
Place the ramekins on a baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the edges are golden and the centers are set.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
To toast the almond meal, spread it evenly on a baking sheet and bake in a 350° oven for 5 minutes, or until lightly golden and fragrant.
